one_time_description: Large payment from Greenstone Gold Mines ($1,417,580) and Long-Term Relationship Agreement revenue ($1,278,133) significantly inflated revenue compared to prior year
economic_notes: Ontario Power Generation settlement of $3,500,000 received in 2016 with per capita distributions ongoing; $510,000 remaining to be distributed to members. COVID-19 impacted operations in March 2020. Greenstone Gold Mines Long-Term Relationship Agreement generated $1,417,580. Subdivision construction-in-progress valued at $2,761,996. Investments in Landmark Inn LP, Four Nations Forestry LP, Minodahmun Development LP among portfolio investments.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) Ombabika Equipment Inc. subsidiary was not audited for 2020 or 2019, preventing verification of all liabilities; (2) no budget was prepared, a departure from PSAB standards. Revenue nearly doubled from prior year primarily due to Greenstone Gold Mines Long-Term Relationship Agreement ($1,278,133) and increased ISC capital funding ($2,520,500 capital). Auditor firm name not clearly identified - location Thunder Bay, Ontario noted. Restricted cash includes Ontario Power Generation disbursements ($505,615) and Recreation Fund ($114,368). No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
